options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: enabled_ccs
options.description: Which engine classes (CCs) generate location checks. (options: 50cc, 100cc, 150cc, Mirror)

options.name: enabled_cup_check_tiers
options.description: Which difficulty tiers generate cup completion checks. (options: 3rd_place, 2nd_place, 1st_place, 1_star, 2_star, 3_star)

options.name: include_race_checks
options.description: Include individual race 1st place checks in addition to cup checks.

options.name: cups_required_for_goal
options.description: Number of cups that must be completed at goal difficulty/CC to win.

options.name: goal_difficulty
options.description: Difficulty tier required for goal cups.

options.name: goal_cc
options.description: Engine class required for goal cups.

options.name: enable_item_randomization
options.description:
Enable mid-race item randomization. When enabled, items from item boxes
are replaced with AP-pool items, and filler/powerup items from the multiworld
are injected into the item slot during races.

options.name: starting_items
options.description:
Which items are available from the start before any Powerup items are
unlocked. These are the only items that can appear from item boxes at the
beginning of the game.
(options: Green Shell, Red Shell, Banana, Fake Item Box, Mushroom,
Triple Mushrooms, Bob-omb, Blue Shell, Lightning, Star, Golden Mushroom,
Mega Mushroom, Blooper, POW Block, Bullet Bill, Triple Green Shells,
Triple Red Shells, Triple Bananas)

options.name: random_item_mode
options.description:
How 'Filler: Random Item' is resolved during a race.
placement_weighted: weighted by GP placement odds for current position.
uniform: uniform random from all unlocked items.

options.name: enable_traps
options.description:
Allow trap items to appear in the item pool.
Requires Enable Item Randomization. Trap weights below control which traps
appear and how often.
DISABLE FOR NOW! NO TRAPS ARE IMPLEMENTED YET!!!

options.name: trap_percentage
options.description: Percentage of filler items that will be traps (0-100).

options.name: trap_weight_brake
options.description: Weight for Brake Trap. Set to 0 to disable.

options.name: trap_weight_gas
options.description: Weight for Gas Trap. Set to 0 to disable.

options.name: trap_weight_boost
options.description: Weight for Boost Trap. Set to 0 to disable.

options.name: trap_weight_cloud
options.description: Weight for Cloud Trap. Set to 0 to disable.

options.name: trap_weight_pow
options.description: Weight for POW Trap. Set to 0 to disable.

options.name: trap_weight_lightning
options.description: Weight for Lightning Trap. Set to 0 to disable.

options.name: filler_item_queue_cap
options.description: Maximum filler items that can be queued per race. 0 = unlimited.

options.name: filler_weight_random
options.description: Weight for Random Item filler.

options.name: filler_weight_mushroom
options.description: Weight for Mushroom filler.

options.name: filler_weight_triple_mushroom
options.description: Weight for Triple Mushroom filler.

options.name: filler_weight_golden_mushroom
options.description: Weight for Golden Mushroom filler.

options.name: filler_weight_star
options.description: Weight for Star filler.

options.name: filler_weight_bullet_bill
options.description: Weight for Bullet Bill filler.

options.name: filler_weight_mega_mushroom
options.description: Weight for Mega Mushroom filler.

options.name: filler_weight_blue_shell
options.description: Weight for Blue Shell filler.

options.name: filler_weight_red_shell
options.description: Weight for Red Shell filler.

options.name: filler_weight_triple_red_shell
options.description: Weight for Triple Red Shell filler.

options.name: filler_weight_bob_omb
options.description: Weight for Bob-omb filler.

options.name: filler_weight_lightning_item
options.description: Weight for Lightning filler (not trap).

options.name: filler_weight_blooper
options.description: Weight for Blooper filler.

options.name: filler_weight_pow_block
options.description: Weight for POW Block filler.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
options: GBA Shy Guy Beach Mirror - 1st Place
N64 DK's Jungle Parkway Mirror - 1st Place

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.
options: GBA Shy Guy Beach Mirror - 1st Place
N64 DK's Jungle Parkway Mirror - 1st Place

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.
options: GBA Shy Guy Beach Mirror - 1st Place
N64 DK's Jungle Parkway Mirror - 1st Place

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
